title: Reward currents of the land
preface: Motivation and reward move like weather through offices. Boof’s canine bias makes the flows smellable: fruit, chase, pack, and the hollow applause of a sealed lie.

currents.label: Immediate fruit
currents.question: Who can still taste reward the same day the work is done?
currents.risk: Only near-term fruit collapses seasonal kitchens.

currents.label: Delayed light
currents.question: Who trusts the seal enough to wait?
currents.risk: Delayed systems hide theft when seals are intact but false.

currents.label: Status treats
currents.question: Who is fed by attention without delivery?

currents.label: Pack warmth
currents.question: Who goes cold first when the measure fails?

generationalTensions.tension: Memory of leaks vs appetite for signal
generationalTensions.bridge: Boof reads both ledgers aloud—repair book and official volume.

generationalTensions.tension: Need for fruit and allotment vs pressure for clean totals
generationalTensions.bridge: Kitchens as scoreboard; seals as claims that must survive scent.
